'''Sinal''' was the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Bacrana system/Legends|Bacrana system]]. An uninhabitable ball of searing hot rock, Sinal [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] close to the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Bacrana (star)|Bacrana]]. [[Starship/Legends|Starships]] approaching Sinal had to be heavily [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]], and could only remain for a short amount of time.<ref name="FBS" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-04-XX -->''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''
